blockers.description: Search Console — atlas.opsman@gmail.com not added as property user. Blocks Search Console data for SCC/HUSA and Newton.
blockers.action: Go to Google Search Console → Settings → Users and Permissions → Add atlas.opsman@gmail.com

blockers.description: OAuth token refresh — People API scope missing. gog re-auth requires browser OAuth flow.
blockers.action: Re-run gog auth with browser open. Requires interactive OAuth — Atlas will attempt tonight.

blockers.description: VERCEL_TOKEN not stored — Atlas cannot trigger manual deploys or verify env vars without Chrome attached.
blockers.action: Create token at vercel.com/account/tokens → add VERCEL_TOKEN to ~/.openclaw/.env

blockers.description: Newton transcript workflow not built — Drive folder ready but Hunter → Ledger → Atlas pipeline has no trigger or automation.
blockers.action: Build Drive watch trigger + agent dispatch pipeline.
